raw_title: Conceptualising Youth Media Strategies: Balancing Platforms, Profiles, and People
title_en: Conceptualising Youth Media Strategies: Balancing Platforms, Profiles, and People
title_zh: 概念化青年媒体策略：平衡平台、个人资料与人际关系
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了年轻人如何制定媒体使用策略，特别是在数字平台上平衡个人资料展示和人际关系维护。它旨在帮助理解青年群体在复杂媒体环境中的行为模式。
plain_summary_en: This article explores how young people develop media strategies, particularly balancing profile presentation and interpersonal relationships on digital platforms. It aims to understand youth behavior patterns in complex media environments.
research_direction_zh: 研究青年在数字时代的媒体使用策略，关注平台选择、自我呈现和社交互动的平衡机制。
research_direction_en: Research on youth media strategies in the digital age, focusing on the balancing mechanisms of platform selection, self-presentation, and social interaction.
